description: Clavain's 4-track routing is more intelligent than LiteLLM (task-aware complexity, evidence calibration, safety floors) but lacks operational capabilities: (1) cost tracking/attribution, (2) cloud provider fallback with retries, (3) rate limit management, (4) unified API gateway, (5) usage observability, (6) privacy-aware routing. With interfere providing local serving, Clavain needs these to route between local and cloud without a proxy.
title: Competitive Landscape: Close Clavain routing gaps vs LiteLLM/OpenRouter
